title: SEMICON India 2026

images.alt: SEMICON India 2026 — event registration and operations platform

overview.description: Event registration & operations platform for a major government-backed industry conference.
overview.details:
End-to-end Laravel application for SEMICON India 2026 — a major industry conference covering public registration, exhibitor booths, sponsorship tiers, payments, and post-login experiences for visitors, exhibitors, sponsors, liaising officers, and internal teams.

The platform unifies attendee self-service, company SPOC workflows, on-site liaison coordination, exhibitor and sponsorship commerce, and role-based admin tooling under one SEMICON-branded system with integrated payments, document exports, and email communications.

features: Unified attendee hub — dashboard with conference content (agenda, sessions, passes), travel and hotel forms, visa clearance, and organiser notifications
SPOC workflows — company contacts invite colleagues via links, track registration status, and manage inaugural ceremony decisions (visitor and exhibitor paths)
Company & organization data — central company list with deduplication and search across past and current records at registration time
Liaising officer workspace — assigned visitors, pass status updates, and read-only travel/accommodation summaries for on-site coordination
Exhibitor & sponsorship — delegate management, booth passes, sponsorship cart/summary, and booth credit toward title sponsorship for large stands (54+ sqm)
Admin by role — menus and tools tailored for visa, sales, visitor ops, and general administration; improved search, tables, and SEMICON branding across emails and UI
